title: pisum montanum
intro: Pisum montanum is a plant species within the pea family, also known as Lathyrus montanus, which is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pisum montanum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Pisum montanum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
